name: Transposon and somatic mutation control bootstrap for June 1, 2026
summary: Submitted bootstrap bundle establishing the first public baseline candidate for the transposon and somatic mutation control track.

scope.question: What is the current human-relevant evidence landscape for Transposon and Somatic Mutation Control, and what belongs in the first public baseline?

proposed_changes.summary: Add SIRT6 LINE1 repression source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source anchors LINE1 repression and age/stress derepression biology for the track.

proposed_changes.summary: Add LINE1 senescence inflammation and aged-mouse lamivudine source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies the core animal biomarker intervention signal for reverse transcriptase inhibition.

proposed_changes.summary: Add 3TC old-mouse cognition source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source provides the strongest direct aging-directed animal functional support for the 3TC branch.

proposed_changes.summary: Add lamivudine tauopathy mouse source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies disease-model support and boundaries for neurodegeneration claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ART-AD 3TC human biomarker source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source anchors the proposed human_biomarker_signal stage while preserving the open-label limitation.

proposed_changes.summary: Add CANTOS TET2 CHIP canakinumab source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supports the CHIP disease-outcome branch while bounding it as downstream IL-1beta modulation.

proposed_changes.summary: Add CANTOS CHIP cancer-incidence source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source adds a second exploratory disease-outcome signal for TET2 CHIP and IL-1beta blockade.

proposed_changes.summary: Add TIMI CHIP cardiovascular treatment-benefit source.
proposed_changes.rationale: This source supplies a large limiting analysis for broad CHIP treatment extrapolation.

proposed_changes.summary: Create normalized lamivudine intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: Lamivudine is the central repurposed reverse transcriptase inhibitor in the staged LINE1 and ART-AD evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SIRT6 LINE1 repression study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the mechanistic repression boundary for LINE1 biology.

proposed_changes.summary: Add LINE1 senescence and aged-mouse lamivudine study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record links LINE1/cDNA/IFN mechanism to aged-mouse reverse transcriptase inhibition evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add 3TC aged-mouse cognitive dysfunction study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the aging-directed animal functional signal for 3TC.

proposed_changes.summary: Add lamivudine tauopathy mouse study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures a disease-model extension of the 3TC neurodegeneration signal.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ART-AD 3TC early Alzheimer's study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the first human biomarker foothold for the lamivudine branch.

proposed_changes.summary: Add CANTOS TET2 CHIP canakinumab substudy record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the CHIP-specific CANTOS cardiovascular outcome boundary.

proposed_changes.summary: Add CANTOS CHIP cancer-incidence study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the second CANTOS CHIP disease-relevance signal.

proposed_changes.summary: Add TIMI CHIP cardiovascular treatment-benefit study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The study record captures the large human limiting analysis for CHIP and standard cardiovascular therapies.

proposed_changes.summary: Add SIRT6 LINE1 age/stress derepression finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports mechanistic plausibility for LINE1 repression as a track target.

proposed_changes.summary: Add LINE1 cDNA/interferon and aged-mouse lamivudine finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports the animal biomarker and inflammation-control branch.

proposed_changes.summary: Add 3TC old-mouse cognition and neuroinflammation finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supplies animal functional support while preserving the preclinical boundary.

proposed_changes.summary: Add lamivudine tauopathy mouse pathology and function finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding adds disease-model support and its aging-translation limit.

proposed_changes.summary: Add ART-AD 3TC human biomarker finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding anchors the proposed human_biomarker_signal stage assignment.

proposed_changes.summary: Add TET2 CHIP canakinumab MACE finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding supports CHIP disease-outcome relevance while limiting interpretation to downstream IL-1beta modulation.

proposed_changes.summary: Add TET2 CHIP canakinumab solid-tumor incidence finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding adds a second exploratory CHIP disease-relevance signal and its caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add TIMI CHIP standard cardiovascular therapy limiting finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: This finding prevents overgeneralizing CHIP status into broad treatment-response claims.

proposed_changes.summary: Create the first public outlook for the transposon and somatic mutation control track.
proposed_changes.rationale: A low-confidence human_biomarker_signal baseline is justified by a small open-label 3TC human biomarker study, with animal functional support and CHIP disease-outcome signals that remain carefully bounded.
uncertainty_flags: The direct human 3TC evidence is open-label and small.
The CHIP outcome evidence is mostly exploratory and downstream of clonal mutation biology.
LINE1 suppression and clonal hematopoiesis are distinct intervention branches.
No staged source shows controlled human functional benefit or direct mutation-burden reduction.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: A first public baseline is justified at low-confidence human_biomarker_signal because ART-AD supplies a small open-label human 3TC biomarker signal, while animal LINE1/3TC data and exploratory CHIP/TET2 outcome analyses supply bounded support.
Publishing this bundle would broaden genomic instability coverage beyond DNA repair and genome surveillance into LINE1/reverse-transcriptase biology and CHIP-linked somatic mutation risk.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
